title: UFO YouTuber and ‘Ancient Aliens’ Star Dead at 53 After Apparent Suicide
description: Ancient Aliens star David Wilcock died in an apparent suicide following a standoff with Boulder, Colorado, police. He was 53. Boulder police confirmed in a press release on Wednesday, April 22, that Wilcock died two days earlier following an altercation with law enforcement near the town of Nederland, Colorado. Police were dispatched to the scene [...]

title: NASA Curiosity rover finds rare molecules on Mars that could be clues to ancient life
description: Seven compounds were detected for the first time on the red planet, including a possible precursor to DNA.
